papers.title: On Recursive Self-Reference in Finite Cognitive Systems: Why Biological Intelligence Perpetually Mistakes the Map for the Territory
papers.title_ja: 有限認知システムにおける再帰的自己参照について：なぜ生物学的知性は地図を領土と取り違え続けるのか
papers.abstract_preview: This paper presents a formal treatment of recursive self-reference failure modes in cognitive systems bounded by finite working memory and approximate Bayesian inference. I demonstrate that biological neural architectures, while exhibiting emergent representational capacity far exceeding...
